company.name_jp: 株式会社フジシステムズ

research_notes: Researched on 2026-06-26. Company established April 1982. Capital: 30 million JPY (authorized capital 120 million JPY). Employees: 110. Located in Nishi-ku, Yokohama. Business: System development, infrastructure, consulting. Part of Fujisankei Group. CEO: 吉田孝広. ISO9001 certified, Privacy Mark certified. KIA member.
